pages.text: $(l)Branded$()$(br)A player wearing the Oathbound Relic and counted by Oathbound systems as part of the burdened path.
$(l)Impact$()$(br)The Colossus Heart meter. Taking strong non-magic hits while Branded builds it. Your next melee hit spends it for bonus damage and a shockwave.
$(l)Heat / Heating Up$()$(br)The Ember Seed meter. Taking and dealing damage build Heat while Branded. Heat decays over time. More Heat means more speed and eventually nearby ignition.
$(l)Reactive Blink$()$(br)The Nebula Lens awakened trigger. A hit can be dodged by blinking away, and the next strike becomes heavily empowered.
$(l)Hollow Dominion$()$(br)A player-facing name for the Void Pearl's awakened darkness aura. In low light while Branded, nearby enemies are afflicted with Wither, Weakness, and Glowing.

$(l)Renewal$()$(br)A player-facing umbrella term, not a separate registered potion effect. In this codex it means emergency sustain or repeat recovery, usually through Regeneration, Absorption, or both.
